HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BRIAN MAS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. BRIAN MAS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BRIAN MAS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. BRIAN MAS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: V. OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 3, 2008: Alan Horwitz, attorney for plaintiff Fillmore Center Associates, LP, also known as Fillmore Properties LLC; David Solis, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Susan Petro, limited scope attorney for defendant Brian Mas, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1755 O'Farrell Street, #1508, San Francisco, California. The July 7, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
